description_long: This helmet is a full-coverage protective mask, featuring a smooth, matte-finished shell in a dark gray color. The front is dominated by a prominent dual-filter respirator system, with two cylindrical black filters extending outward from the lower face area. The eye region is sharply contoured with angular, visor-like cutouts, giving it an aggressive, tactical appearance. The helmet is secured with two wide, black straps that wrap around the back and sides, providing a snug fit. The rear of the helmet is relatively plain, with the straps and the back of the shell visible, and no visible branding or graphic design elements.
description: A dark gray, full-face helmet with dual black respirator filters and angular eye cutouts, secured by wide black straps. The design is sleek and utilitarian, with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet's angular eye cutouts and the prominent dual black respirator filters.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet's smooth shell, the protruding filter, and the two wide securing straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet shell and the two black straps, with no visible filters or eye cutouts.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet's profile, filter, and strap arrangement.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two large circular filter vents on the lower front, no other visible ventilation openings.
